source: Core list from 张咋啦 follow-builders (github.com/zarazhangrui/follow-builders), extended with high-signal independent technical builders and content-type filtering

content_filter.description: We track CONCRETE product information, NOT opinions.
include: Official blog posts from product companies
Production case studies with verifiable data
Conference talks with first-hand product content
exclude: Opinions / hot takes / predictions without product substance
VC fundraise announcements (unless the product is AI builder-facing)

builders.name: Boris Cherny
builders.track_for: Claude Code feature launches, usage data, product direction, demo workflows
search_keywords_zh: Boris Cherny Claude Code 最新
builders.why: Claude Code PM, one of the most important AI coding tool builders

builders.name: Thariq Shihipar
builders.track_for: Fable model updates, AI product design patterns, Fable usage behavior
builders.why: Fable model PM, shaping how AI products are designed

builders.name: Swyx

builders.name: Andrej Karpathy
builders.track_for: Major talks and technical posts only. Skip general threads and predictions.
builders.why: Defines paradigms (vibe coding, agentic engineering). Track talks and deep posts, skip opinions.

builders.name: Simon Willison
builders.track_for: Reproducible LLM experiments, coding-agent workflows, evaluations, Datasette and llm tool releases. Skip link-only posts and general commentary.
search_keywords_en: Simon Willison latest AI engineering post
search_keywords_zh: Simon Willison LLM 工程 实验 2026
builders.why: Consistently publishes first-party, reproducible AI engineering experiments and ships open-source tools.

builders.name: Armin Ronacher
builders.track_for: Agent harnesses, tool calling, developer infrastructure, model behavior in production, and shipped technical experiments. Skip general opinions without evidence.
search_keywords_en: Armin Ronacher latest AI engineering post
search_keywords_zh: Armin Ronacher Agent 工具调用 工程 2026
builders.why: Long-running developer-tools builder who publishes detailed first-party analysis of model and agent behavior.
